responses: Hello! Welcome to our chatbot support platform. How can I help you today?
Hi there! How can I assist you today?
Greetings! What can I do for you today?

Admissions can be applied for online via the admissions portal on our main website. Applications for the next academic year open in June and close in August. Would you like me to guide you to the portal?

Fees vary by course and semester. You can view the detailed fee structure under the 'Academics -> Fees' section on our portal. Payments can be made via credit/debit card, net banking, or UPI through our secure online payment gateway.

Yes, we provide separate hostel facilities for boys and girls with 24/7 security, Wi-Fi, and mess facilities. Hostel registration can be requested during the admission process or by visiting the Hostel Warden's office.

patterns: how to apply for bus pass
what document is needed for bus pass
responses: You can apply for a student bus pass online via the Bus Pass module. You will need to upload your college ID card, a passport-sized photograph, and address proof. Verification takes 2-3 working days.

patterns: does the bus go to my area
responses: Our transport facility covers 15 major routes across the city. Buses run twice a day (morning pickup and evening drop). The detailed list of routes, pickup points, and timings is available on the transport info page.

patterns: what to do if ticket is lost
responses: If you have lost your bus pass/ticket, please report it immediately to the transport office. A duplicate pass can be issued upon submitting a copy of your application and paying a nominal replacement fee of $10.

Refunds are processed in accordance with our refund policy. If you cancel your admission before classes start, you are eligible for a 90% refund. Request forms are available at the accounts department.
You can contact our support team at support@example.com or call our helpline at +1-800-555-0199 (Mon-Fri, 9 AM to 5 PM). Alternatively, you can submit a feedback form or a complaint.

We are sorry to hear that. You can submit a formal complaint directly through your dashboard. Go to settings/support, or submit a comment using the feedback form. We aim to address all grievances within 48 hours.

This platform is designed to answer student queries regarding Admissions, Fees, Hostel accommodation, Bus Passes, and general FAQ. Type your question in the chat bar below, and I will assist you instantly!
